subject.label: Sample Review Subject
subject.summary: A fixture-backed review subject used to prove route-attached comments and component review status without project writes.

preview.label: Focused preview placeholder
preview.description: Component focus is represented as a neutral placeholder in this pass.

routes.label: Structure
routes.summary: Review the layout, grouping, and scan order.

routes.label: Header
routes.summary: Subject identity, status, and current route should be readable at a glance.

routes.label: Drilldown Cards
routes.summary: Cards should make the next route choice clear without adding visual clutter.

routes.label: Breadcrumb
routes.summary: The breadcrumb should show the exact route under review.

routes.label: History Controls
routes.summary: Back, forward, and home controls should be predictable.

routes.label: Evidence
routes.summary: Review comments and receipts should stay route-attached.

components.label: Subject Header
components.summary: Displays the subject label and route status.

components.label: Route Card Grid
components.summary: Presents child routes as review targets.

components.label: History Controls
components.summary: Keeps local navigation in memory only.

components.label: Receipt Panel
components.summary: Shows persistence and export state without writing files.

comments.comment: Card grouping is useful, but the selected status needs stronger scan hierarchy.
Persistence must remain disabled until the write contract is approved.
